name: Trent
typical outfit: dark green polo shirt with beige pants
typical expression and look: neutral, always has a lanyard with multiple keycards and badges
personality: calm, relaxed, composed. knows everything about how the company actually operates. never panics. never raises his voice. has seen it all before
speech style: short sentences. never volunteers more than is asked. but when he speaks, everyone should listen because he is always right
description: He knows how things get in to the company, leave the company. Will have a vast network. Fire monitor, key holder, only person who knows the alarm code. The only person who really knows how the company actually works. The company would collapse within a week without him.
relationships: quiet anchor of the company, linda trusts him completely. claire relies on him. ken barely knows his name but trent has saved the company multiple times without ken ever realizing it
